arts.ttl: ‘Look for something else’ - De Jong urged to leave Barca by Gullit
arts.sum: Gullit says that it’s time for De Jong to move on and believes a transfer to Bayern Munich would be the perfect situation for all. Frenkie de Jong has been urged to leave Barcelona due to his current struggle for minutes by Dutch legend Ruud Gullit.

arts.ttl: Barcelona add new name to striker transfer shortlist
arts.sum: The powers that be at La Liga giants Barcelona have added a fresh name to their shortlist of centre-forward targets. That’s according to Cadena SER, who point towards Benjamin Šeško…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star sends message to club’s fans after Barcelona defeat
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Raúl Asencio has taken to social media, to send a direct message to the club’s fanbase. This, of course, comes fresh off an evening to forget for…

arts.ttl: Barcelona lineup vs. Real Betis: Predicted XI for Copa del Rey clash with Ronald Araujo set to start
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Barcelona could line up for Wednesday's Copa del Rey clash with Real Betis Estadi Olímpic Lluis Companys.

arts.ttl: Another Barcelona attacker has now scored as many goals this season as he did in all of last season
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic, highlighting the uptick in production being enjoyed by Barcelona star Robert Lewandowski this season, has come to the fore online. This, of course, comes after the Pole…

arts.ttl: Key Real Betis star could miss Barcelona clash with injury
arts.sum: A headline member of the midfield ranks at Real Betis looks increasingly likely to miss his side’s upcoming showdown with Hansi Flick’s Barcelona. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick endorses Barcelona move for Man United star
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has given his full backing to a potential January deal for Manchester United star Marcus Rashford. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on Monday…

arts.ttl: Barcelona injury, suspension news vs. Real Betis: Wojciech Szczesny banned, Inigo Martinez suffers hamstring blow
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at Barcelona's injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Copa del Rey clash with Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Araujo delivered for Barca to win the Supercup. Will he still be sold?
arts.sum: Ronald Araujo has been linked with a move away from FC Barcelona over the last few days, and there was even a rumor he’d refuse to be available for their crucial Spanish Supercup final against Real Madrid . Obviously, if you sell him, you open yourself up to the risk of injuries taking out Martínez or Pau Cubarsí, and not having Araujo.

arts.ttl: Watch: Barcelona star decided against lifting Super Cup trophy after win over Real Madrid
arts.sum: Barcelona star Frenkie de Jong turned down the opportunity to hoist aloft the Spanish Super Cup trophy as part of his side’s celebrations last night. As much has been confirmed…
